component.name: Torrent Throttle
component.summary: Pause or throttle torrent downloads when specific programs are running

description.p: Torrent Throttle is a panel applet for the COSMIC™ desktop. It monitors running processes on your system and automatically pauses or throttles torrent downloads when a matching program is detected. Downloads resume or speed limits are restored when the program exits.

ul.li: Pause all torrents or apply speed throttle when matching processes are running
Automatic resume/restore when matching processes exit
Connects to qBittorrent via its Web API (more clients planned)
Panel applet for the COSMIC™ desktop

screenshot.caption: Settings window with qBittorrent connection, action mode, and process patterns
Panel applet popup showing live throttle status and matched processes

description.p: Fix monitor status not updating across applet instances when installed as a flatpak, and show a clear message when no qBittorrent URL is configured.
Fix settings not persisting when installed as a flatpak.
Release flatpak bundles and fix the flatpak manifest build commands.
Custom applet and app icons, guaranteed client-state restore, and release workflow fixes.
Initial release with pause and throttle modes.
